title: Toy Story 3
tmdbOverview: Woody, Buzz, and the rest of Andy's toys haven't been played with in years. With Andy about to go to college, the gang find themselves accidentally left at a nefarious day care center. The toys must band together to escape and return home to Andy.
synopsis: Toy Story 3 (2010) is a animation, family and comedy film from United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a G certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
